testcase.name: testBaselineResolvesV2MLinks
testcase.system-out:
19:29:26.983 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.plm.PlmExtendedTest]: PlmExtendedTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 19:29:27.214 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.plm.PlmApplication for test class com.plm.PlmExtendedTest

testcase.name: testSignatureAfterContentChange
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-17T19:29:38.796Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=c5f38bf8-1b6e-4747-9c46-82d4dce31e40 owner=alice testcase.name: testDuplicateSignatureRejected
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-17T19:29:38.939Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=18a5bcc3-2ad4-4819-84e6-3fdc376d9a92 owner=alice 2026-04-17T19:29:38.950Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] com.plm.domain.service.NodeService : Node created: id=a3727811-3074-4ab2-9d8d-882d6372501e type=792dfc9f-f077-43bf-b2a7-8d101e370ec0 user=alice 2026-04-17T19:29:38.959Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction committed: id=18a5bcc3-2ad4-4819-84e6-3fdc376d9a92 owner=alice versions=1 deferred=0 continuation=null comment='Initial creation' 2026-04-17T19:29:38.962Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=221f6c4b-11a4-49d2-b9ef-ebb4236f0d54 owner=bob 2026-04-17T19:29:38.980Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] com.plm.domain.service.VersionService : Version created: node=a3727811-3074-4ab2-9d8d-882d6372501e v=2 A.1 type=SIGNATURE tx=221f6c4b-11a4-49d2-b9ef-ebb4236f0d54 user=bob 2026-04-17T19:29:38.985Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.plm.domain.service.SignatureService : Signature: node=a3727811-3074-4ab2-9d8d-882d6372501e user=bob meaning=Reviewed A.1 tx=221f6c4b-11a4-49d2-b9ef-ebb4236f0d54 2026-04-17T19:29:38.992Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction committed: id=221f6c4b-11a4-49d2-b9ef-ebb4236f0d54 owner=bob versions=1 deferred=0 continuation=null comment='Signed' 2026-04-17T19:29:38.996Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=bc8122dc-29af-44d6-8748-5b7ff91b2ae1 owner=bob

testcase.name: testMetaModelCreation
testcase.system-out:
2026-04-17T19:29:39.021Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.plm.domain.service.MetaModelService : Lifecycle created: Custom LC 2026-04-17T19:29:39.027Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.plm.domain.service.MetaModelService : State 'Draft' added to lifecycle 75cf34f7-d9a9-4ba6-ac83-1bba37f96406 2026-04-17T19:29:39.028Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.plm.domain.service.MetaModelService : State 'Released' added to lifecycle 75cf34f7-d9a9-4ba6-ac83-1bba37f96406 2026-04-17T19:29:39.031Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.plm.domain.service.MetaModelService : Transition 'Release' added: b9ea07e0-13bf-419b-8275-8d699812b036 → 0948f61b-f6f2-41a9-8127-640499e5f2f6 2026-04-17T19:29:39.034Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.plm.domain.service.MetaModelService : NodeType created: Component scheme=ALPHA_NUMERIC parent=null 2026-04-17T19:29:39.035Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.plm.domain.service.MetaModelService : AttributeDefinition 'serialNumber' created on nodeType e45e01c0-cdc8-4b6a-b2c1-3c29a9bd5810 2026-04-17T19:29:39.040Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.plm.domain.service.MetaModelService : AttributeStateRule set: nodeType=e45e01c0-cdc8-4b6a-b2c1-3c29a9bd5810 attr=0b6a9ad8-5773-4f50-98e6-06cedb14e54e state=0948f61b-f6f2-41a9-8127-640499e5f2f6 required=true editable=false 2026-04-17T19:29:39.060Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] org.jooq.impl.FieldsImpl : Ambiguous match found for required. Both "public"."attribute_definition"."required" and "public"."attribute_state_rule"."required" match.

testcase.name: testSignatureHistory
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-17T19:29:39.087Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=5056fd15-9904-4f38-8de0-c66abe43e354 owner=alice 2026-04-17T19:29:39.099Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] com.plm.domain.service.NodeService : Node created: id=1d1fa8b1-646d-41a2-ab79-b7abf32a8587 type=29e75506-2de0-49df-aa53-9beb3a2fe42a user=alice 2026-04-17T19:29:39.105Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction committed: id=5056fd15-9904-4f38-8de0-c66abe43e354 owner=alice versions=1 deferred=0 continuation=null comment='Initial creation' 2026-04-17T19:29:39.107Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=9d5e5f8a-5827-41a1-afbd-de8a0cf67e28 owner=bob 2026-04-17T19:29:39.120Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] com.plm.domain.service.VersionService : Version created: node=1d1fa8b1-646d-41a2-ab79-b7abf32a8587 v=2 A.1 type=SIGNATURE tx=9d5e5f8a-5827-41a1-afbd-de8a0cf67e28 user=bob 2026-04-17T19:29:39.124Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.plm.domain.service.SignatureService : Signature: node=1d1fa8b1-646d-41a2-ab79-b7abf32a8587 user=bob meaning=Reviewed A.1 tx=9d5e5f8a-5827-41a1-afbd-de8a0cf67e28 2026-04-17T19:29:39.131Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction committed: id=9d5e5f8a-5827-41a1-afbd-de8a0cf67e28 owner=bob versions=1 deferred=0 continuation=null comment='Reviewed by bob' 2026-04-17T19:29:39.134Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=9f56a2ce-14bf-4646-88ae-8c6c8ec6b062 owner=charlie 2026-04-17T19:29:39.146Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] com.plm.domain.service.VersionService : Version created: node=1d1fa8b1-646d-41a2-ab79-b7abf32a8587 v=3 A.1 type=SIGNATURE tx=9f56a2ce-14bf-4646-88ae-8c6c8ec6b062 user=charlie 2026-04-17T19:29:39.151Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.plm.domain.service.SignatureService : Signature: node=1d1fa8b1-646d-41a2-ab79-b7abf32a8587 user=charlie meaning=Approved A.1 tx=9f56a2ce-14bf-4646-88ae-8c6c8ec6b062 2026-04-17T19:29:39.157Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction committed: id=9f56a2ce-14bf-4646-88ae-8c6c8ec6b062 owner=charlie versions=1 deferred=0 continuation=null comment='Approved by charlie'

testcase.name: testSignaturePreservesIteration
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-17T19:29:39.385Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=49e53373-06d6-4805-b2ab-a0dcee39913b owner=alice 2026-04-17T19:29:39.391Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] com.plm.domain.service.NodeService : Node created: id=f0a19378-e804-437b-bbbf-ae4016401e16 type=3f87e570-5c86-480d-ae4f-ca6bea4761c6 user=alice 2026-04-17T19:29:39.396Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction committed: id=49e53373-06d6-4805-b2ab-a0dcee39913b owner=alice versions=1 deferred=0 continuation=null comment='Initial creation' 2026-04-17T19:29:39.398Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction opened: id=5387874d-0750-4bcf-9716-06271e79b046 owner=bob 2026-04-17T19:29:39.410Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] com.plm.domain.service.VersionService : Version created: node=f0a19378-e804-437b-bbbf-ae4016401e16 v=2 A.1 type=SIGNATURE tx=5387874d-0750-4bcf-9716-06271e79b046 user=bob 2026-04-17T19:29:39.414Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.plm.domain.service.SignatureService : Signature: node=f0a19378-e804-437b-bbbf-ae4016401e16 user=bob meaning=Reviewed A.1 tx=5387874d-0750-4bcf-9716-06271e79b046 2026-04-17T19:29:39.418Z INFO 82 --- [plm-core] [ main] c.p.d.service.PlmTransactionService : Transaction committed: id=5387874d-0750-4bcf-9716-06271e79b046 owner=bob versions=1 deferred=0 continuation=null comment='Signed'
